titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Genealogical Manuscripts Collection

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 10:37

did.abstract: An artificial collection of manuscript and printed genealogical material and genealogies on Connecticut area families, ca. 1600-1980.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Genealogical Manuscripts Collection (MS 234). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: An artificial collection of manuscript and printed genealogical material and genealogies on Connecticut area families, ca. 1600-1980.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The following genealogical charts are in rolls and may require flattening for viewing.

did.unittitle: Cody family [branch of Beckley family of Wethersfield, CT], 1952
De Haven family [merger of Biddle family], 1953
Shipton family [Edward Shipton (Shipman) and his first wife Elizabeth Comstock, second wife Mary Andrews]
